description: Fragment of a ketubba (marriage contract) which stipulates that the bride would move from Tyre to Akko in twelve months, ca. 1028-1037. The bride's father gave her an appartment in Acre where the couple will live, under the condition that he (the father) can stay in the appartment with them whenever he wants, alone with other family members, for a visit or for good. Text in Arabic script on verso.
description_he: שבר כתובה הקובעת כי הכלה תעבור מצור לעכו תוך שנה, בערך 1028–1037. אביה נותן לה דירה בעכו.
